business.name: Ahlan Café & Restaurant
business.description: Delicious food, refreshing drinks, and a warm atmosphere in the heart of Masaki.

coffee.name: Signature Espresso
coffee.description: Double shot of our house blend with notes of dark chocolate and caramel.

coffee.name: Velvet Cappuccino
coffee.description: Rich espresso topped with silky steamed milk and hand-poured latte art.

coffee.name: 24-Hour Cold Brew
coffee.description: Slow-steeped for 24 hours. Smooth, bold, and naturally sweet with zero bitterness.

coffee.name: Honey Lavender Latte
coffee.description: House-made lavender syrup, local wildflower honey, and oat milk.

coffee.name: Tanzanian Peaberry
coffee.description: Single-origin from Mbeya region. Bright, fruity, and full-bodied.

coffee.name: Iced Mocha
coffee.description: Espresso, Belgian chocolate, cold milk, and whipped cream.

breakfast.name: Ultimate Avocado Toast
breakfast.description: Sourdough, smashed avocado, poached eggs, chili flakes, and microgreens.

breakfast.name: Fluffy Buttermilk Pancakes
breakfast.description: Stack of three with maple syrup, fresh berries, and whipped butter.

breakfast.name: Power Breakfast Bowl
breakfast.description: Quinoa, scrambled eggs, avocado, cherry tomatoes, spinach, and tahini dressing.

breakfast.name: Almond Butter Croissant
breakfast.description: Flaky house-baked croissant filled with house-made almond cream.

breakfast.name: Full English Breakfast
breakfast.description: Eggs, bacon, sausage, baked beans, grilled tomato, mushrooms, and toast.

breakfast.name: Tropical Fruit Bowl
breakfast.description: Seasonal fresh fruits with granola, coconut flakes, and honey drizzle.

lunch.name: Mediterranean Grain Salad
lunch.description: Farro, cucumber, feta, olives, sun-dried tomatoes, lemon-herb vinaigrette.

lunch.name: Grilled Chicken Panini
lunch.description: Herb-marinated chicken, mozzarella, pesto, roasted peppers on ciabatta.

lunch.name: Rainbow Buddha Bowl
lunch.description: Roasted sweet potato, chickpeas, kale, purple cabbage, edamame, tahini.

lunch.name: Soup of the Day
lunch.description: Rotating daily selection. Ask your server for today's fresh creation.

lunch.name: Beef Burger & Fries
lunch.description: Wagyu beef patty, cheddar, caramelized onions, brioche bun, hand-cut fries.

lunch.name: Fish Tacos
lunch.description: Grilled tilapia, cabbage slaw, chipotle crema, corn tortillas, lime.

desserts.name: Classic Tiramisu
desserts.description: Layers of espresso-soaked ladyfingers, mascarpone, and cocoa dust.

desserts.name: Fudge Brownie Sundae
desserts.description: Warm double-chocolate brownie with vanilla ice cream and salted caramel.

desserts.name: New York Cheesecake
desserts.description: Creamy baked cheesecake with graham cracker crust and berry compote.

desserts.name: Sea Salt Chocolate Chip Cookie
desserts.description: Fresh-baked daily. Crispy edges, gooey center, flaky sea salt finish.

desserts.name: Mango Sticky Rice
desserts.description: Thai-style sticky rice with coconut milk and fresh mango slices.

desserts.name: Affogato
desserts.description: Vanilla gelato drowned in a shot of hot espresso.

drinks.name: Green Vitality Smoothie
drinks.description: Spinach, mango, banana, ginger, and coconut water. No added sugar.

drinks.name: Fresh Pressed Orange Juice
drinks.description: 100% fresh-squeezed oranges. Nothing added, nothing taken away.

drinks.name: Ceremonial Matcha Latte
drinks.description: Premium Japanese matcha whisked with steamed oat milk and honey.

drinks.name: Belgian Hot Chocolate
drinks.description: Real Belgian chocolate melted into steamed milk with whipped cream.

drinks.name: Passion Fruit Mojito
drinks.description: Fresh passion fruit, mint, lime, soda water. Non-alcoholic.

drinks.name: Hibiscus Iced Tea
drinks.description: Brewed hibiscus flowers with a hint of ginger and honey.

features.title: Locally Sourced
features.description: We partner with local farms and roasters within 50 miles to ensure the freshest ingredients in every dish.

features.title: In-House Roasting
features.description: Our beans are roasted fresh every morning in small batches for that perfect aroma and flavor profile.

features.title: Dietary Friendly
features.description: Extensive vegan, gluten-free, and keto options. Everyone deserves a great meal, no matter their diet.

features.title: Work-Friendly Space
features.description: Free high-speed WiFi, plenty of outlets, and quiet zones make us the perfect remote work spot.

testimonials.name: Sarah Mitchell
testimonials.text: The best coffee I've had in the city, hands down. The cold brew is life-changing, and the staff remembers my name and order. This is my third office.

testimonials.name: James Kim
testimonials.text: Finally a café that takes dietary restrictions seriously. Their gluten-free avocado toast and oat milk lattes are incredible. My whole family loves coming here.

testimonials.name: Emily Rodriguez
testimonials.text: We held our book club meetup here and the team was so accommodating. Great atmosphere, amazing pastries, and the WiFi is rock solid for remote work.

testimonials.name: David Liu
testimonials.text: The honey lavender latte is pure magic. You can taste the quality in every sip. This place has ruined all other coffee shops for me — and I'm not mad about it.
